task_completion.description: Navigate to the specified Wikipedia article in Tor Browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser is open with 'https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open-source_intelligence' visible in the address bar.

task_completion.description: Enable Reader View for the article.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tor Browser address bar shows the Reader View icon as active (often highlighted or showing 'about:reader?url=' in the address bar), and the page layout is simplified without standard Wikipedia sidebars.

task_completion.description: Configure Reader View to use a Dark theme and Serif font.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The article text is rendered in a Serif font on a dark background. The Reader View typography settings menu (Aa icon) might be visible showing 'Dark' and 'Serif' selected.

task_completion.description: Save the article's clean text to the specified file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog saving the page to '/home/ga/Documents/osint_clean_extract.txt', or a text editor/file manager showing this exact file path containing the article text.

task_completion.description: Create a bookmark for the Reader View page with the specified name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bookmark creation dialog (popup from the star icon in the address bar) showing the name 'OSINT Clean Reading', or the bookmark visible in the bookmarks toolbar/menu.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Tor Browser GUI to navigate and view the page.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Tor Browser window and standard web navigation, not terminal commands like `curl`, `wget`, or python scripts fetching the URL.

integrity.description: Verify the text styling came from the browser's Reader View.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's built-in Reader View is visibly active in the browser window, rather than the agent manually pasting text into a dark-themed text editor to fake the appearance.

integrity.description: Verify the bookmark was created using the browser's GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's bookmark dialog, star icon, or library menu is used, rather than terminal commands editing the Firefox/Tor places.sqlite database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open-source_intelligence. Output file path: /home/ga/Documents/osint_clean_extract.txt. Expected bookmark title: 'OSINT Clean Reading'. Reader View must be configured with a 'dark' theme and 'serif' font.
